title: Tata Consultancy Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Tata Consultancy Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Tata Consultancy Services has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Indore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Tata Consultancy Services:
Tata Consultancy Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Consultancy Services!
